label: Send Request
command: [ -z "$ZED_FILE" ] && echo 'Save the file first (.http or .rest)' && exit 1; rest-client-lsp --exec "$ZED_FILE" $ZED_ROW

label: REST: Copy as cURL
command: [ -z "$ZED_FILE" ] && echo 'Save the file first' && exit 1; rest-client-lsp --to-curl "$ZED_FILE" $ZED_ROW | pbcopy && echo 'Copied cURL to clipboard'

label: REST: Generate Python
command: [ -z "$ZED_FILE" ] && echo 'Save the file first' && exit 1; rest-client-lsp --generate python "$ZED_FILE" $ZED_ROW | pbcopy && echo 'Copied Python code to clipboard'

label: REST: Generate JavaScript
command: [ -z "$ZED_FILE" ] && echo 'Save the file first' && exit 1; rest-client-lsp --generate javascript "$ZED_FILE" $ZED_ROW | pbcopy && echo 'Copied JavaScript code to clipboard'

label: REST: Generate Go
command: [ -z "$ZED_FILE" ] && echo 'Save the file first' && exit 1; rest-client-lsp --generate go "$ZED_FILE" $ZED_ROW | pbcopy && echo 'Copied Go code to clipboard'

label: REST: Request History
command: [ -z "$ZED_FILE" ] && echo 'Save the file first' && exit 1; rest-client-lsp --history "$ZED_FILE"
